3dee32af5aba.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
3dee32af5aba.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
3dee32af5aba.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

e109194c5187.title: Close the hygiene gap — 3 to 5
e109194c5187.description: An FSA rating of 3 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
e109194c5187.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

d5ef86d2ca72.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
d5ef86d2ca72.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

28e14252b0cd.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
28e14252b0cd.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
28e14252b0cd.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

c2be6c7f8f2b.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
c2be6c7f8f2b.description: Your 4.6/5 Google rating feels dominant but you sit below the local median (P0.0). Peer venues achieve similar or better ratings — in this market, 4.5 is table stakes, not a differentiator. Don't mistake the number for an advantage.
c2be6c7f8f2b.management_implication: The rating looks good in isolation but not in context.

66ddae6f81c2.title: Ranked #2 of 2 locally — peers are ahead
66ddae6f81c2.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

38da38eb83a6.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
38da38eb83a6.description: You trail peers by 1.0 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

365e526ee647.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
365e526ee647.description: You trail peers by 3.0 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

66427639a415.title: Protect the 4.6/5 rating — it took years to build
66427639a415.description: With 590 reviews at 4.6/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
